subcodes.first_line: O friends of the All-Merciful in Milan! The Wronged One hath turned His face toward you from this ordained Prison, and maketh mention of you with that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اولیاء الرحمن فی میلان قد توجه الیکم وجه المظلوم من هذا السجن المحتوم و ذکرک بما
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @chastisement and requital, @call to action, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice
